questions.question: What continent is home to one-third of the world's languages?
What Beatles single lasted longest on the charts, at 19 weeks?
What tragedy occurred two years to the day after the federal raid on the Branch Davidian complex in Waco?
What ill-fated auto bit the dust in 1959 after losses of $250 million?
Who came within 54 home runs of Babe Ruth's career record despite missing two seasons while serving in the military?
What momentary British monarch was dubbed "little man" by ex-girlfriends?
